name: Salsa Fria (Cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the cumin, onion, and hot pepper. Saute until the onion is translucent, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes, pineapple, lime juice, and cinnamon.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Cool. Serve at room temperature. Exceptionally good with grilled fish.
Yield: Approximately 2 1/2 cups.
